headline: Dell To Rally More Than 21%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
summary: Analysts change outlook on top names: Mizuho downgrades PYPL, B of A increases CIEN PT, Needham raises TSM PT, HC Wainwright slashes ALLO PT, Goldman raises MS PT, Baird raises WM PT, Bernstein raises INTC PT, B of A raises PNC PT.

headline: Jack Daniel Maker Brown-Forman Gets $15 Billion Bid From Sazerac, Disrupting Pernod Talks: Report
summary: Sazerac's $15 billion bid for Brown-Forman may disrupt a potential merger with Pernod Ricard, reshaping the spirits industry.
